ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the participant */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "initial_bmi" REAL /* Initial Body Mass Index (BMI) of the participant */,
  "initial_weight" REAL /* Initial weight of the participant */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the participant enrolled in the study */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the participant */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the participant */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the participant */,
  "smoking_status" TEXT /* Smoking status of the participant */,
  "alcohol_consumption" TEXT /* Alcohol consumption habits of the participant */,
  "physical_activity_level" TEXT /* Baseline physical activity level of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition (e.g., noBreakfast) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "caloric_intake" REAL /* Average caloric intake for the condition */,
  "meal_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of meals for the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exercises" (
  "exercise_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exercise */,
  "exercise_name" TEXT /* Name of the exercise (e.g., none, high) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the exercise */,
  "duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Average duration of the exercise in minutes */,
  "intensity_level" TEXT /* Intensity level of the exercise */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exercise_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participant_conditions" (
  "participant_condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant condition assignment */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the condition */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the condition */,
  "compliance" TEXT /* Participant's compliance with the condition */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments regarding the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participant_conditions_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participant_conditions_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participant_exercises" (
  "participant_exercise_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant exercise assignment */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "exercise_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exercise */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the exercise */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the exercise */,
  "frequency_per_week" INTEGER /* Frequency of the exercise per week */,
  "compliance" TEXT /* Participant's compliance with the exercise */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments regarding the exercise */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_exercise_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participant_exercises_exercise_id FOREIGN KEY ("exercise_id") REFERENCES exercises ("exercise_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participant_exercises_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date of the measurement */,
  "weight_lost" REAL /* Weight lost by the participant */,
  "bmi" REAL /* Body Mass Index (BMI) of the participant */,
  "body_fat_percentage" REAL /* Body fat percentage of the participant */,
  "waist_circumference" REAL /* Waist circumference of the participant */,
  "hip_circumference" REAL /* Hip circumference of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date of the rating */,
  "user_rating" INTEGER /* User rating on a scale of 1 to 5 */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the participant */,
  "ease_of_following" INTEGER /* How easy the participant found it to follow the regimen */,
  "side_effects" TEXT /* Any side effects experienced by the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the researcher */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., lead, assistant) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or affiliation of the researcher */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant whose data was accessed */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phase_tracking" (
  "phase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each phase */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "phase_name" TEXT /* Name of the phase (e.g., Phase 1, Phase 2) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the phase */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the phase */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the phase (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  "goals_achieved" TEXT /* Whether the goals of the phase were achieved */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments regarding the phase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_phase_tracking_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)
